aggregate_point_description: The Aggregate Points tool performs statistical analysis of points, e.g. count, sum, min or max, and aggregates the information on polygons.
aggregate_polygon_description: The Aggregate Polygon tool performs statistical analysis of polygons, e.g. count, sum, min or max, and aggregates the information on polygons.

danger_zone_delete_team_body: Delete your team and remove all shared data and projects. Your personal or other users data will not be deleted. This action cannot be undone!

default_label_tooltip: Text shown when multiple values are present
delete_account_confirmation_body:
Before deleting your account, ensure you download any data you want to keep, and note that the following will occur:

  • Your content data will be permanently removed.
  • If you co-own an organization or team with other administrators, the ownership of that team will be transferred to another admin.
  • In the absence of fellow administrators or if you are the sole member of a team or organization, it will undergo an irreversible deletion along with all associated data.
  • Remember, this action cannot be undone; once it's executed, it's done for good.

Please enter {{email}} to confirm the deletion of your account.
delete_layout_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the layout {{name}}?
delete_member_description: Are you sure you want to remove this member from the organization?
delete_organization_confirmation_body:
Before deleting your organization, ensure you download any data you want to keep, and note that the following will occur:

  • Your content and all other member's resources will be permanently deleted.
  • This includes all teams, layers, projects and datasets
  • Remember, this action cannot be undone; once it's executed, it's done for good.

Please enter {{organization_name}} to confirm the deletion of your organization.
delete_scenario_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete scenario {{scenario}}?
delete_team_confirmation_body: Are you sure you want to delete your team? This will remove all shared data and projects, including those used in other team members projects. This action cannot be undone!
delete_this_feature: Are you sure you want to delete this feature ?
delete_workflow_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the workflow {{name}}?

func_abs_desc: Returns the absolute (positive) value of a number
func_age_desc: Returns the difference between two dates
func_avg_desc: Returns the average of all values in a group
func_case_desc: Conditional expression: CASE WHEN condition THEN result ELSE other END
func_ceil_desc: Rounds a number up to the nearest integer
func_ceiling_desc: Rounds a number up to the nearest integer
func_coalesce_desc: Returns the first non-null value from the list
func_cos_desc: Returns the cosine of an angle in radians
func_count_desc: Counts the number of rows in a group
func_date_part_desc: Extracts a part from a date (year, month, day, hour, etc.)
func_date_trunc_desc: Truncates a date to specified precision
func_exp_desc: Returns e raised to the power of x (exponential function)
func_floor_desc: Rounds a number down to the nearest integer
func_if_desc: Returns one value if condition is true, another if false
func_left_desc: Returns the first n characters of text
func_length_desc: Returns the number of characters in text
func_ln_desc: Returns the natural logarithm of a number
func_log10_desc: Returns the base-10 logarithm of a number
func_log_desc: Returns the logarithm of a number
func_max_desc: Returns the maximum value in a group
func_min_desc: Returns the minimum value in a group
func_mod_desc: Returns the remainder of a division
func_now_desc: Returns the current date and time
func_nullif_desc: Returns null if both values are equal, otherwise returns the first value
func_power_desc: Raises a number to a power
func_right_desc: Returns the last n characters of text
func_round_desc: Rounds a number to specified decimal places
func_sign_desc: Returns the sign of a number (-1, 0, or 1)
func_sin_desc: Returns the sine of an angle in radians
func_sqrt_desc: Returns the square root of a number
func_st_area_desc: Returns the area of a polygon geometry in square units
func_st_buffer_desc: Returns a buffer polygon around a geometry
func_st_centroid_desc: Returns the centroid (center point) of a geometry
func_st_distance_desc: Returns the distance between two geometries
func_st_length_desc: Returns the length of a line geometry
func_st_perimeter_desc: Returns the perimeter of a polygon geometry
func_st_x_desc: Returns the X coordinate of a point
func_st_y_desc: Returns the Y coordinate of a point
func_stddev_desc: Returns the standard deviation of values
func_sum_desc: Returns the sum of all values in a group
func_tan_desc: Returns the tangent of an angle in radians
grid_coverage_hint: Draw a bounding box on the map to define the grid coverage area
group_by_hint: Select columns to group results by (optional)
group_by_requires_aggregate: When using Group By, your expression must use aggregate functions like SUM(), AVG(), COUNT(), MIN(), or MAX().
group_delete_warning: This will also delete {{layerCount}} layer(s) and {{groupCount}} subgroup(s) contained within this group.
heatmap_closest_average_description: The average travel time to the nearest N destinations is shown, starting from each grid cell.
heatmap_connectivity_description: Connectivity of transport routes is determined by calculating catchment areas for each grid cell, where the reached area is the measure for connectivity.
heatmap_gravity_description: The accessibility is calculated from each grid cell to multiple locations simultaneously. The travel times are weighted and aggregated using a impedance function.

operator_%_desc: Modulo: Returns the remainder after division (e.g., a % b)
operator_*_desc: Multiplication: Multiplies two numbers (e.g., a * b)
operator_+_desc: Addition: Adds two numbers together (e.g., a + b)
operator_-_desc: Subtraction: Subtracts the second number from the first (e.g., a - b)
operator_/_desc: Division: Divides the first number by the second (e.g., a / b)
